sections.paragraph:
Original: ארגּב

Transliteration: 'argôb

Phonetic: ar-gobe'

BDB Definition:

Argob = "heap of clods"
  1. a district or area in Bashan (noun proper locative)
  2. one of king Pekah's officers (noun proper masculine)

Origin: from the same as H7263

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
